mapper.sql: select p.progress_id, p.student_id, p.section_id, p.progress, p.completion_status, p.last_position, p.create_time, p.update_time, su.nickname as student_name, s.title as section_title from edu_section_progress p left join edu_section s on p.section_id = s.section_id left join edu_student es on p.student_id = es.student_id left join sys_user su on es.user_id = su.user_id
mapper.select: select IFNULL(sum(p.progress) / count(*), 0) as course_progress from edu_section_progress p inner join edu_section s on p.section_id = s.section_id inner join edu_chapter c on s.chapter_id = c.chapter_id where p.student_id = #{studentId} and c.course_id = #{courseId}
